2605.11814.title: MedMemoryBench: Benchmarking Agent Memory in Personalized Healthcare
2605.11814.paper_summary: The large-scale deployment of personalized healthcare agents demands memory mechanisms that are exceptionally precise, safe, and capable of long-term clinical tracking. However, existing benchmarks primarily focus on daily open-domain conversations, failing to capture the high-stakes complexity of real-world medical applications. Motivated by the stringent production requirements of an industry-leading health management agent serving tens of millions of active users, we introduce MedMemoryBench. We develop a human-agent collaborative pipeline to synthesize highly realistic, long-horizon medical trajectories based on clinically grounded, synthetic patient archetypes. This process yields a massive, expertly validated dataset comprising approximately 2,000 sessions and 16,000 interaction turns. Crucially, MedMemoryBench departs from traditional static evaluations by pioneering an "evaluate-while-constructing" streaming assessment protocol, which precisely mirrors dynamic memory accumulation in production environments. Furthermore, we formalize and systematically investigate the critical phenomenon of memory saturation, where sustained information influx actively degrades retrieval and reasoning robustness. Comprehensive benchmarking reveals severe bottlenecks in mainstream architectures, particularly concerning complex medical reasoning and noise resilience. By exposing these fundamental flaws, MedMemoryBench establishes a vital foundation for developing robust, production-ready medical agents.
2605.11814.paper_summary_zh: 大規模部署個性化醫療代理需要極其精確、安全且能夠進行長期臨床追蹤的記憶機制。<lb/>然而，現有的基準主要集中在日常開放領域的對話上，未能捕捉到現實醫療應用中的高風險複雜性。<lb/>受到為數以千萬計的活躍用戶提供服務的行業領先健康管理代理的嚴格生產要求的驅動，我們推出了 MedMemoryBench。<lb/>我們開發了一個人機協作管道，根據臨床基礎的合成病人原型，合成高度真實的長期醫療軌跡。<lb/>該過程產生了一個龐大且經過專業驗證的數據集，包含約 2,000 個會話和 16,000 次互動回合。<lb/>至關重要的是，MedMemoryBench 脫離了傳統的靜態評估，開創了一種“邊構建邊評估”的流式評估協議，精確地反映了生產環境中的動態記憶累積。<lb/>此外，我們正式化並系統性地研究了記憶飽和的關鍵現象，即持續的信息流入會主動降低檢索和推理的穩健性。<lb/>全面的基準測試揭示了主流架構中的嚴重瓶頸，特別是在複雜醫療推理和抗噪聲能力方面。<lb/>通過揭示這些根本缺陷，MedMemoryBench 為開發穩健的、準備投入生產的醫療代理奠定了重要基礎。
2605.11814.author: Yihao Wang et.al.
2605.11814.authors: Yihao Wang, Haoran Xu, Renjie Gu, Yixuan Ye, Xinyi Chen, Xinyu Mu, Yuan Gao, Chunxiao Guo, Peng Wei, Jinjie Gu, Huan Li, Ke Chen, Lidan Shou
